body: Marcus, great connecting at the Breakthrough Energy Summit last week — always good to have a chance to catch up in person amid the chaos of those events. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we started around the [Solara Grid](companies/solara-grid) deal, specifically the question of whether there's room for a co-lead structure at the Series A. At [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), we've been tracking Solara closely for the past two quarters and have strong conviction on both the hardware-software integration thesis and the founding team's ability to execute in regulated markets. Given a16z's climate infrastructure appetite, I think the economics could work well if we align on valuation guardrails before they open the round formally. Would you be open to a 30-minute call this week or next to compare notes before either of us moves further with Priya's team?
